prompt: A 2 kg block on a rough horizontal table with μ=0.3 is connected over a frictionless pulley to a 3 kg hanging block attached to a spring k=100 N/m. Released from rest when unstretched. Find maximum extension, maximum velocity, period, and energy.
A 10 kg object moves in circular motion with radius 2 m and speed 5 m/s. Find centripetal acceleration and force.
